queries.question: Give me the coverage options that each home insurance policy offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Coverage_Options.Description  from Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options join Coverage_Options on Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options.OptionID = Coverage_Options.OptionID join Home_Insurance_Policies on Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options.PolicyID = Home_Insurance_Policies.PolicyID   GROUP BY Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options.OptionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options.PolicyID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Home_Insurance_Policies)

queries.question: Give me the coverage options that each home insurance policy offers.
queries.sql: select home_insurance_policies.homeaddress , coverage_options.description from Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options join Coverage_Options on Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options.OptionID = Coverage_Options.OptionID join Home_Insurance_Policies on Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options.PolicyID = Home_Insurance_Policies.PolicyID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?homeaddress ?description WHERE {
  ?home_insurance_policies_coverage_options a :Home_Insurance_Policies_Coverage_Options .
  ?coverage_options a :Coverage_Options .
  ?home_insurance_policies_coverage_options p:hasCoverage_Options ?coverage_options .
  ?home_insurance_policies a :Home_Insurance_Policies .
  ?home_insurance_policies_coverage_options p:hasHome_Insurance_Policies ?home_insurance_policies .
  ?home_insurance_policies p:HomeAddress ?homeaddress .
  ?coverage_options p:Description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the coverage options that each home insurance policy offers.
